front.title: GRASP through routers: a Problem Statement

abstract.t: This document analyzes challenges for using the GeneRic Autonomic Signaling Protocol (GRASP) in the context of deployment of services on machines (servers, Virtual Machines, etc) without the network elements, such as routers, needing any support for GRASP by themselves. It analyses issues regarding the discovery mechanism, including discovery across subnets and operation across administrative boundaries, and provides terminology and general considerations for the development of future extensions, profiles, and architectural refinements.
